news.title: SpaceX rises 12% to leapfrog Amazon, briefly top Microsoft in market cap
news.summary: Elon Musk says Tesla "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030. CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might" reach approximately$1 trillion in revenue by 2030. Musk said the company could be worth as much as $2 trillion.

news.title: Rivian laying off hundreds of workers amid R2 launch
news.summary: Rivian said Tuesday it was laying off hundreds of workers, or less than 2% of its workforce. Rivian: The cuts will affect less than 1% of our workforce.

news.title: Snap unveils $2,195 AR glasses as CEO Evan Spiegel bets on post-smartphone future
news.summary: Snap is launching its first AR glasses geared toward the broader public instead of developers. Snap is launching the glasses with a price tag of $99.

news.title: General Motors announces new defense partnership with Lockheed Martin
news.summary: General Motors announced a new defense partnership with Lockheed Martin. The move comes as the U.S. ramps up its production of weapons. General Motors is a major supplier of parts to Lockheed Martin and other defense contractors.

news.title: Trump signals he could send details of Iran deal to Congress
news.summary: The peace deal announced Sunday is meeting lukewarm reactions from Congress, including some allies of President Donald Trump. The peace deal was announced Sunday by President Barack Obama and French President Francois Hollande.

news.title: Chicken tenders are taking over the world, and KFC is rushing to keep up
news.summary: Chicken sandwiches can be easily eaten in the car. They can be made with chicken tenders, not bone-in wings. The sandwiches can also be made to order, not to be served.

news.title: Global oil prices break below $80 for the first time since the Iran war began. Ships still aren’t passing through Hormuz.
news.summary: Only a fraction of normal tanker volumes are moving through the Strait of Hormuz, shipping data show. The Strait is a key shipping route between the Persian Gulf and the Red Sea.

news.title: America’s fertility rate has never been lower. Blame smartphones — and these 4 financial realities.
news.summary: Having as many children as families want requires “gender equality, economic stability, decent health and confidence in the future,” the report says.

news.title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
news.summary: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible,” she said.

news.title: These life-insurance policies are booming. Here’s who should — and shouldn’t — buy one.
news.summary: Indexed universal life insurance policies have a very specific purpose that can help families. If used correctly, they can be used to help families, if used correctly.
